examples: Please speak mannerly with the eldership.
The young children deported themselves in a mannerly way.
The child was scolded by his grandmother for not being more mannerly.
The aristocracy might be selfish and sometimes cruel, but it's also witty, cultivated, mannerly and effortlessly elegant and self-assured.
Perhaps things between Ralcorp and ConAgra will get more mannerly with Meister around.
